hotels.name: Hotel Spero, Vignette Collection — an IHG Hotel
hotels.description: A beautifully restored 1920s boutique art hotel steps from Union Square. The rooms are stylish and warm, the neighbourhood is buzzing, and cable cars stop right outside. It's one of the most characterful IHG properties in the city — exactly the kind of hotel that makes a city feel special.

hotels.name: Airbnb — 7111 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood
hotels.address: 7111 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
hotels.description: Your private Hollywood home base for three nights. Right in the heart of West Hollywood — five minutes from Beverly Hills, ten from the Walk of Fame, surrounded by great restaurants and cafés. Space, privacy, and a proper kitchen to come back to after a big LA day.

hotels.name: Excalibur Hotel & Casino
hotels.address: 3850 Las Vegas Blvd S, Las Vegas, NV 89109
hotels.description: A full-on medieval castle rising from the Las Vegas Strip — turrets, towers, and 4,000 rooms right in the middle of all the action. Bellagio, MGM Grand and the High Roller are all walkable. The price is fantastic for the location and the kids will love the theme.

hotels.name: Airbnb At Niagara
hotels.description: Your private Niagara base puts you minutes from the Falls themselves. Wake up to misty air, hear the distant thunder of the water, and walk out the door straight to one of the greatest natural spectacles on Earth. Image to follow.

hotels.name: Residence Inn by Marriott Washington Downtown/Convention Center
hotels.description: One of Washington's smartest all-suite stays, right in the heart of downtown. The National Mall, White House, Capitol Hill and all the monuments are within comfortable walking distance. Suite-style rooms give everyone proper space after long days touring the most iconic capital in the world.

hotels.name: Residence Inn By Marriott New York Queens
hotels.description: Spacious extended-stay suites in Long Island City with a stunning Manhattan skyline view right across the East River. The 7-train reaches Times Square in under 10 minutes — this is one of New York's smartest base camps. Plenty of room for the family to spread out after a huge day in the city.

hotels.name: Motto by Hilton New York City Times Square
hotels.description: A sleek, modern micro-hotel perched right in the middle of Times Square — walk out the door and you're at the crossroads of the world. Perfect for the final days of the trip when you want to absorb every last second of New York energy. Broadway marquees, world-class restaurants, and the buzz of Manhattan on your doorstep.
